documentation:
## Aliyun ROS MPS Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as MPS from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-mps';
```

```
param scope



param id
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflow.attr_creation_time
documentation: Attribute CreationTime: The time when the media workflow was created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflow.attr_media_workflow_id
documentation: Attribute MediaWorkflowId: The ID of the media workflow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflow.attr_name
documentation: Attribute Name: The name of the media workflow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflow.attr_state
documentation: Attribute State: The state of the media workflow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflow.attr_topology
documentation: Attribute Topology: The topology of the media workflow.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflow.attr_trigger_mode
documentation: Attribute TriggerMode: The trigger mode of the media workflow.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MPS::MediaWorkflow`, which is used to add a media workflow.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosMediaWorkflow\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mps-mediaworkflow>

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflowProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `MediaWorkflow`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mps-mediaworkflow>

```
param name

Property name: The topology of the media workflow. The value cannot be empty. The name cannot be the same as that of an existing media workflow within the current Alibaba Cloud account. The name can be up to 64 characters in length. The value must be encoded in the UTF-8 format.

param topology

Property topology: The topology of the media workflow. The value must be a JSON object that contains the activities and activity dependencies. For more information, see the Sample topology section of this topic.Note The Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket must reside in the same region as your MPS service.

param trigger_mode

Property triggerMode: The triggering mode of the media workflow. Valid values: OssAutoTrigger: The media workflow is automatically triggered. NotInAuto: The media workflow is not automatically triggered.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflowProps.name
documentation:
Property name: The topology of the media workflow.

The value cannot be empty.
The name cannot be the same as that of an existing media workflow within the current Alibaba Cloud account.
The name can be up to 64 characters in length.
The value must be encoded in the UTF-8 format.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflowProps.topology
documentation:
Property topology: The topology of the media workflow.

The value must be a JSON object that contains the activities and activity dependencies. For more information, see the Sample topology section of this topic.Note The Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket must reside in the same region as your MPS service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.MediaWorkflowProps.trigger_mode
documentation:
Property triggerMode: The triggering mode of the media workflow.

Valid values:
OssAutoTrigger: The media workflow is automatically triggered.
NotInAuto: The media workflow is not automatically triggered.

classes.name: ros_cdk_mps.Pipeline

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.Pipeline.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.Pipeline.attr_pipeline_id
documentation: Attribute PipelineId: The ID of the MPS queue.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MPS::Pipeline`, which is used to create an ApsaraVideo Media Processing (MPS) queue.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosPipeline\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mps-pipeline>

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.PipelineProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Pipeline`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mps-pipeline>

```
param name

Property name: The new name of the MPS queue. The value can contain letters, digits, and special characters such as hyphens (-) and can be up to 128 bytes in size. The value cannot start with a special character.

param notify_config

Property notifyConfig: The Message Service (MNS) configuration, such as the information about the MNS queue or topic. For more information, see NotifyConfig.

param role

Property role: The role that is assigned to the current RAM user. To obtain the role, you can log on to the RAM console and choose Identities > Roles in the left-side navigation pane.

param speed

Property speed: Pipe type. Value: Boost: Double-speed transcoding Standard: ordinary pipe NarrowBandHDV2: Narrowband HD 2.0 AIVideoCover: Smart Screenshots AIVideoTag: video tag (supports regions Shanghai, Beijing, Hangzhou). Default: Standard.

param speed_level

Property speedLevel: Speed level.

param state

Property state: The new state of the MPS queue. Active: The MPS queue is active. Jobs in the MPS queue can be scheduled and run by MPS. Paused: The MPS queue is paused. Jobs in the MPS queue cannot be scheduled or run by MPS, and all jobs remain in the Submitted state. Jobs that are running will not be affected.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.PipelineProps.name
documentation:
Property name: The new name of the MPS queue.

The value can contain letters, digits, and special
characters such as hyphens (-) and can be up to 128 bytes in size. The value cannot
start with a special character.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.PipelineProps.notify_config
documentation:
Property notifyConfig: The Message Service (MNS) configuration, such as the information about the MNS queue or topic.

For more information, see NotifyConfig.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.PipelineProps.role
documentation:
Property role: The role that is assigned to the current RAM user.

To obtain the role, you can log on to the RAM console and choose Identities > Roles in the left-side navigation pane.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.PipelineProps.speed
documentation:
Property speed: Pipe type.

Value:
Boost: Double-speed transcoding
Standard: ordinary pipe
NarrowBandHDV2: Narrowband HD 2.0
AIVideoCover: Smart Screenshots
AIVideoTag: video tag (supports regions Shanghai, Beijing, Hangzhou).
Default: Standard.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.PipelineProps.speed_level
documentation: Property speedLevel: Speed level.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.PipelineProps.state
documentation:
Property state: The new state of the MPS queue.

Active: The MPS queue is active. Jobs in the MPS queue can be scheduled and run by MPS.
Paused: The MPS queue is paused. Jobs in the MPS queue cannot be scheduled or run by MPS, and all jobs remain in the Submitted state. Jobs that are running will not be affected.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.RosMediaWorkflow.name
documentation:
:Property:

name: The topology of the media workflow.
The value cannot be empty.
The name cannot be the same as that of an existing media workflow within the current Alibaba Cloud account.
The name can be up to 64 characters in length.
The value must be encoded in the UTF-8 format.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.RosMediaWorkflow.topology
documentation: :Property: topology: The topology of the media workflow. The value must be a JSON object that contains the activities and activity dependencies. For more information, see the Sample topology section of this topic.Note The Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket must reside in the same region as your MPS service.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.RosMediaWorkflow.trigger_mode
documentation:
:Property:

triggerMode: The triggering mode of the media workflow. Valid values:
OssAutoTrigger: The media workflow is automatically triggered.
NotInAuto: The media workflow is not automatically triggered.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MPS::MediaWorkflow`, which is used to add a media workflow.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `MediaWorkflow` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mps-mediaworkflow>

```

param topology



param trigger_mode

```

documentation:
:Property:

speed: Pipe type. Value:
Boost: Double-speed transcoding
Standard: ordinary pipe
NarrowBandHDV2: Narrowband HD 2.0
AIVideoCover: Smart Screenshots
AIVideoTag: video tag (supports regions Shanghai, Beijing, Hangzhou).
Default: Standard.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mps.RosPipeline.state
documentation:
:Property:

state: The new state of the MPS queue.
Active: The MPS queue is active. Jobs in the MPS queue can be scheduled and run by MPS.
Paused: The MPS queue is paused. Jobs in the MPS queue cannot be scheduled or run by MPS, and all jobs remain in the Submitted state. Jobs that are running will not be affected.
